productName: Stars & Rosin - Kiwi Sherbert x Banana Cream Rosin - .5g
description: Hand-rolled hybrid infused blunt of Kiwi, boosted with concentrate for big aroma, a slow burn, and serious strength. Boosted for extra strength and more intense effects — a tangy kiwi flavor, with an even, best-of-both-worlds feel. A little goes a long way.
